//: Pins the .NET SDK so the dev box, CI and the Docker image agree on the toolchain.
//why: windows-latest preinstalls an SDK newer than the one we target, and `dotnet build` silently takes the newest SDK installed unless it is pinned here. Before this pin, CI was building the net9.0 targets with SDK 10.0.301 while the dev box used 9.0.315 — it worked, but a toolchain that differs between CI and dev is a latent trip hazard.
//rollForward: latestFeature = accept any 10.0.x SDK (whatever the dev box, the runners and the sdk:10.0 image carry), but NEVER roll forward to 11. A box with only an older or newer major fails loudly, which is the intent. Bump this and the Dockerfile's sdk/aspnet tags together.
